plan.failureSummary: The test failed because a cached selector for the 'Select your occupation' field could not find its target. Visual inspection of the failure screenshot shows that the form currently displays an 'Age Group' radio group instead of the expected occupation dropdown.
observedIndicators: UI contains 'Age Group' instead of cached 'Select your occupation' field
Pass rate is 63% with alternating success/failure pattern in history

remediationSteps.details: Clear the PageAI cache for this test and re-run. The autonomous agent should be able to handle the different form fields (Age Group) once it is not bound by stale deterministic selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate suitability of deterministic mode for unstable UI
remediationSteps.details: If the survey remains highly dynamic, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test or increasing the retry count to allow for cache-refresh cycles.

plan.notes: The application under test is explicitly named 'unstable-survey', suggesting intentional dynamic changes to form fields. The deterministic cache is failing to account for these variations. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and adapt to the current fields.
